technical.lead: NVIDIA stock retakes a $5T market cap (Apr 24 close, +4.3%)
technical.body: Intel's after-close beat on Apr 23 lights up the chip sector. NVIDIA closes at $208.27 — a record — taking market cap to $5.12T. The gap to Alphabet widens past $1T. AMD adds another — +13.90% ($347.77) — the same day, the Nasdaq Composite hits a record — +1.63% at 24,836.60**, and the S&P 500 prints a record **+0.80% at 7,165.08**.******

technical.lead: Tesla turns Apr 25 into Earth Day marketing, gives away limited "Plant Cubes" planted by Optimus V3
technical.body: At U.S. Tesla flagship stores on — Earth Day (Apr 25) — , FSD (Supervised) demo-drive participants receive a limited — Plant Cube** planted by Optimus. The Apr 23 print reaffirmed Optimus V3's **mid-2026 debut and July-August mass-production start**, with 2026 capex officially guided above $25B. Fremont prepares for 1M units / year, with a planned second factory in Giga Texas at 10M units / year.******

citations.label: MediaPost - Tesla Earth Day Campaign Targets Humans, Humanoids Too

technical.lead: Google Cloud × Thinking Machines Lab: a multi-billion-dollar AI infrastructure deal (Apr 22)
technical.body: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab adopts Google Cloud A4X Max VMs powered by NVIDIA — GB300 — . Training / serving speed is — 2x** the prior generation. Single-digit billions in size, announced at Google Cloud Next '26. The third frontier-lab deal after Anthropic and Meta — central to Google's AI Hypercomputer strategy.******

citations.label: Google Cloud Press - Thinking Machines Expands Use of Google Cloud AI Hypercomputer

technical.lead: BMW Group begins serious AEON humanoid trials at Plant Leipzig from April 2026 + opens a Physical AI Center of Competence
technical.body: Building on Spartanburg's Figure 02 record ( — 30,000 X3 vehicles supported in 10 months, 90,000 parts / 1.2M steps / 1,250 hours running — ), BMW opens Europe's first Physical AI hub in Leipzig. The Hexagon Robotics-built — AEON** (22 sensors / self-swap battery / 4-layer Physical AI / autonomy learned in 20 demos) is in trial from April 2026, on the path to a summer pilot.******

citations.label: BMW Group Press - BMW Group bringing Physical AI to Europe / Pilot project at BMW Group Plant Leipzig

technical.lead: CISA adds 4 entries to KEV catalog on Apr 24 (Samsung / SimpleHelp x2 / D-Link)
technical.body: — Apr 24, CISA adds CVE-2024-7399 (Samsung MagicINFO 9 Server Path Traversal), CVE-2024-57726 (SimpleHelp Missing Authorization), CVE-2024-57728 (SimpleHelp Path Traversal), and CVE-2025-29635 (D-Link DIR-823X Command Injection) — all under "actively exploited." Federal agencies get a new remediation deadline. Vendor-agnostic MSP / RMM / industrial display / home-router CVEs that are old but still active are back in the spotlight.

citations.label: CISA - CISA Adds Four Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to Catalog
